audit_items.proof_trace: Property requires NULL-check of ber_strdup result before strlen. Counterexample: password argument case 'w' stores ber_strdup result into passwd.bv_val and immediately calls strlen on it (line 990) without checking for NULL, causing NULL pointer dereference on allocation failure.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker supplies a large password argument causing memory exhaustion; ber_strdup returns NULL, leading to crash via strlen(NULL) and denial of service.
